text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Ramonu... I hope this will be a
joyful and successful year for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text: Oh my, it's an honor to hear from you. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
I must say, your well-wishes are usually more...
verbose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Every year, I struggle with what to say on your
birthday. I fear I have been hiding those feelings
and many more behind flowery words.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So this year, I chose to express myself plainly and
honestly... Was it insufficient?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text: ...This reminds me of when you were younger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
...A crescent moon bearing a crown of flowers, her
innocent radiance glowing softly within.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...But even so, her faint glow could never light up
the hidden depths of the mountain that towered
in the night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Nor is it her responsibility to do so. Does the
moon know this?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She knows this now. That's why the moon chose to
descend—to become one with the earth and
support the mountain as well as everything it
towers over.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That is why I offer my wishes to you now, under
the brilliant light of the sun... Happy birthday,
Ramonu.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I see that no matter how much you try to
hold it in, the core of you never changes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Rudolf. I'm grateful to receive your
kind words.
